name: copilotprompts-sprint-governance-agent
title: SPRINT Governance Agent
shortDescription: Generate structured finance summaries and help users track expenses.
longDescription: A Copilot agent that acts as an AI governance architect, helping teams assess agents, flows, and automations against the SPRINT framework - Security, Privacy by Design, Responsible AI by Default, Identity, No Retrofit Rule, and Track & Measure - flagging gaps, risks, and recommendations tied to specific Microsoft controls like Entra Agent ID and Purview DLP.
